observations: Windows GET http://127.0.0.1:8765/health timed out after two seconds.
Windows had no listening socket on local port 8765 and runs/gpu.lock was absent.
The pinned-interpreter import preflight produced no WSL output within the bounded shell execution and therefore did not establish imports.
A separately launched, command-line-verified `wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-22.04 -- /bin/true` canary timed out after ten seconds.
Only the exact owned canary client PID 45284 was force-stopped; it was confirmed stopped afterward.
No non-Docker wsl.exe client remained after cleanup.

non_evidence_disclosed.issue: An attempted managed import launcher used ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList, which is unavailable in this Windows PowerShell runtime; it launched bare wsl.exe and timed out.
non_evidence_disclosed.cleanup: The exact owned bare-client PID was stopped and confirmed absent.

claim_boundary: This is a local preflight failure only. It does not prove FastAPI/Uvicorn/MaskFactory imports, service health, failure-control conformance, champion-backed prediction, certificate issuance, or MF-P6-11.07 completion, and it is not a global project blocker.
